name: docs-content
tagline: Guides authoring, editing, and validating Supabase documentation content (MDX/TOML) per house style, terminology, and navigation rules.
verdict: Solid, low-risk authoring guide with clear sourcing hierarchy, concrete validation commands, and a worked anchor-pinning example. Gaps: no stated exclusions, no guidance if lint/build validation fails, a navigation-entry step with no duplicate check, and no version signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere; doesn't point away from adjacent tasks (e.g. editing generated reference source).
Anchor-link breakage is explicitly handled (grep + update matches), but failures of `pnpm lint:mdx` / `pnpm build:guides-markdown` are never addressed.
Adding a page to NavigationMenu.constants.ts has no existence check described; rerunning the workflow risks a duplicate entry.
